Specialties

What I Help With

Focused guidance across the areas that actually move the needle.

Physique Transformation

Build a leaner, fuller, more aesthetic body with a clear plan.

Looks Optimization

Leverage pharmacology to achieve the face you've always wanted.

PED and Cycle Optimization

Taking the enhanced route more intelligently without making reckless mistakes while staying healthy, mitigating side effects, and looking good.

Peptide Optimization

Learn what matters, what is overhyped, and what may fit your goals.

Cutting & Lean Bulking

Approach fat loss and size phases with precision instead of guesswork.

Bloodwork Analysis

Understand the markers that matter — and how diet, supplementation, PED, peptide, and ancillary adjustments keep them where they need to be.

Sourcing

The enhancement space is flooded with underdosed, overpriced, and outright fake products — and navigating it alone comes with real risks. I help you cut through the noise, make smarter sourcing decisions, and avoid the mistakes that most people make.

Looks Preservation

Going enhanced without knowing what you're doing can easily make you look old, red, bloated, bald, and covered with acne. I'll help you negate all these side effects and keep you looking good.

About Dillan

I Live The Standard
I Teach

I became obsessed with understanding how to transform — physique, hormones, confidence, discipline, and execution.

Through years of research, real-world application, and relentless self-experimentation, I built a system focused on helping ambitious men level up faster and avoid the mistakes most people make when they try to go enhanced alone.

No generic advice. No fake guru energy. No recycled plans. Just direct strategy built around your goals.
